options.a: component of the total aerodynamic force, perpendicular to the local airflow.
options.b: vertical component of the total aerodynamic force, perpendicular to the undisturbed airflow.
options.c: component of the total aerodynamic force, perpendicular to the undisturbed airflow.
options.d: component of the total aerodynamic force, perpendicular to the mean aerodynamic chord.
